<!--
  Thanks for contributing to sleek-modeline!

  For anything that touches behaviour, design or style, please make sure this PR is backed by an existing issue. Feature PRs that arrive out of the blue may be closed in favour of a conversation first. Trivial fixes (typos, docs, one-line bug fixes) don't need an issue. See CONTRIBUTING.org for the full workflow.
-->

Closes #<!-- issue number, if any -->

## Description

A clear and concise description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix.
- [ ] New feature/segment.
- [ ] Code style (formatting, naming, etc.).
- [ ] Refactor (no functional or API changes).
- [ ] Documentation.
- [ ] Build/packaging.
- [ ] Tests.
- [ ] CI.
- [ ] Other.

## Screenshots

<!--
  sleek-modeline is a visual package, so screenshots (or a short recording) are very helpful for any changes that alter appearance. Delete this section for non-visual changes.
-->

## Notes for documentation

<!--
  Anything that helps document the change: a sentence or two, a code snippet, etc. Rough notes are fine.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is linked to an existing issue, or is a trivial fix that doesn't need one.
- [ ] I wrote this description and any in-code comments myself (not AI-generated).
- [ ] I have reviewed all the code in this PR and vouch for its quality.
- [ ] I have read and followed the [contribution guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.org).
- [ ] `just build` succeeds with no byte-compile warnings.
- [ ] `just lint` and `just checkdoc` pass.
- [ ] I have tested the change manually in a real Emacs session.
- [ ] I have updated documentation where needed (README, docstrings).
